## What's the priority case?

<!-- Why does this vendor deserve priority over others not yet mapped? Customer count? Strategic importance? Specific deployment you need to integrate with? -->

## Are you offering to drive the work?

- [ ] Yes — I'll run Phase A and submit a PR with the initial overlay
- [ ] Partial — I have sandbox credentials and can run Phase B+, but I want help structuring the overlay
- [ ] No — I'm just requesting; someone else will pick this up

## Vendor dev-relations contact?

If you work on this vendor's dev-relations team and you're proactively claiming a slot, please say so. We fast-track vendor PRs.
